description: Legal record, likely from a court ledger. Location: Fustat. Dated: 8 Heshvan 1473 Seleucid = 30 October 1161 CE, under the authority of Netanʾel ha-Levi. Containing a detailed record about an oath given by Abū Manṣūr Elʿazar b. Natan ha-Kohen concerning many claims dropped by Sitt al-Ḥasab bt. Abū l-Faḍl ha-Sar ha-Levi Ibn al-Baṣrī against one of her agents who happened to be a tenant in one of her houses. Written and signed by Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver; also signed by Yaʿaqov b. Yosef ha-Kohen. (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, p. 326, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
